plantFlowers.name: Plant 9 flowers
plantFlowers.description: Use a variable and a repeat loop to plant 9 flowers at positions 10, 20, 30, ..., 90.

stuck.question: I'm totally stuck
stuck.answer: Check the recent videos on how to use repeat loops and how to update variables to track state. They should tell you everything you need to know.

plant.description: Plants a flower at the given **position**.
